name: Silvercrest Asset Management Group Inc.
summary: of this Annual Report on Form 10-K. Overview We are a full-service wealth management firm focused on providing financial advisory and related family office services to ultra-high net worth individuals and institutional investors. In addition to a wide range of investment capabilities, we offer a full suite of complementary and customized family office services for families seeking a comprehensive oversight of their financial affairs.
